title: elymus tenuis
intro: Elymus tenuis, also known as slender wheat grass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus tenuis include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and infusions, to harness its nutritional and medicinal properties.
